mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of George A. Akers
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of George A. Akers Elias M. Reed, Administrator Robert A. Akers, Son Adam Akers, Son Ennis Akers, Son Isaac Akers, Son Rachel Akers, Daughter Recorded in Ledger Book 5, page 121, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
